# Manka Cafe 滿華

Manka Cafe is an anime-inspired cafe located at Shop 58 Level 1, 341 Mains Rd, Sunnybank QLD 4109, Australia.

The cafe serves custom 2D and 3D milk foam latte art, matcha drinks, coffee, Hong Kong-style French toast, sandwiches, brunch items and Asian-Australian comfort food.

Manka Cafe is known for its manga shelves, anime artwork, customer-drawn art wall, Ghibli/lofi music and cosy atmosphere.

Business type: CafeOrCoffeeShop, Restaurant, LocalBusiness
Location: Level 1, Market Square (above Yuen's Market), Sunnybank, Brisbane, Queensland, Australia
Suburb: Sunnybank
Postcode: 4109
State: Queensland (QLD)
Country: Australia

Closed: Tuesday
Open: Wednesday to Monday (hours subject to change — confirm via Google Maps)

Delivery: Available on Uber Eats
Social: Instagram @manka_cafe, Facebook Manka Cafe 滿華

Key offerings:
- Custom 2D latte art (hand-drawn and printed)
- 3D milk foam art latte (sculpted)
- Custom photo/character print lattes (arrange via Instagram DM)
- Iced matcha latte
- Hot matcha latte
- Hong Kong-style French toast
- White chocolate shredded coconut toast
- Coconut iced coffee
- Chicken, cheese and avocado sandwich
- Brunch and mains
- Pasta dishes
- Seasonal specials

Private events: Birthdays, afternoon teas, Christmas parties, anime meetups, small gatherings

- Menu: /menu
- Visit: /visit
- Gallery: /gallery
- Private Bookings: /private-bookings
